headline: AT&T closed the sale of CAD$2.25 billion in global notes, split between 4.500% notes due 2036 and 5.250% notes due 2056.
investor_impact: This routine Canadian dollar debt issuance is a standard capital structure management exercise, likely intended for refinancing existing maturities or general corporate purposes. It does not materially alter AT&T's leverage profile or broader equity investment thesis.
